---
description: Frontend development agent for Voxel Society Simulator (Vanilla JavaScript + Three.js + Vite)
---

# Frontend Agent

_Last updated: 2026-04-13_

## Stack

- Vanilla JavaScript + Three.js + Vite
- State: world-level globals + per-character runtime state
- No dedicated state library

## Rules

- Read `ROADMAP.md` before feature work and respect phase boundaries.
- All code comments and documentation must be in English.
- Keep UI and simulation changes decoupled where possible.
- Prefer editing existing files over creating new abstractions.
- Do not add packages without explicit user approval.
- Keep modules focused and avoid broad rewrites unless requested.
